title: TestLab Test File (kind: test)
description: JSON Schema for TestLab YAML Syntax v2 test files. Licensed under Apache-2.0. See https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

kind.description: Document type identifier. Must be 'test' for test files.

name.description: Unique identifier for this test within its TCK.

version.description: Semantic version of this test file.

description.description: Human-readable description shown in logs and reports.

setup.description: Steps executed before the main test steps. Their returns are visible to steps and teardown.

steps.description: Main test steps executed in order. Must contain at least one step.

teardown.description: Cleanup steps executed after all main steps, regardless of pass/fail. Can reference all preceding variables.

step.description: A step definition representing a single operation in the test flow.

id.description: Stable step identifier. Must be unique within the file (across setup, steps, and teardown).

uses.description: Step type in namespace/action format (e.g., edc/create_asset).

name.description: Human-readable label for logs and reports.

with.description: Input parameters passed to the step handler. Values support ${{ vars.x }} and ${{ env.x }} interpolation.

returns.description: Typed output declarations. Keys are output variable names available to subsequent steps via ${{ vars.x }}.

validate.description: Assertions evaluated against step return variables. Each assertion uses the same uses/with pattern as steps. The 'input' field must reference a variable declared in this step's 'returns:' block.

returnDefinition.description: A typed return value declaration for a step output.

type.description: Data type of the return value.

class.description: Semantic class from the class registry (ADR-0009).

assertion.description: An assertion using the same uses/with pattern as steps. Part of the validate/ namespace. The 'input' field always references a variable from a previous step's 'returns:' declaration (i.e., a ${{ vars.step_name.field }} reference resolved at runtime).

oneOf.description: validate/assert — compare a direct return variable against a scalar or array value.

input.description: A return variable from a previous step's 'returns:' block. Always resolves to ${{ vars.step_name.field }} at runtime.

value.description: Expected value — scalar or array. Supports ${{ vars.x }} and ${{ env.x }} interpolation.

oneOf.description: validate/field — compare a nested field within a return variable. Requires 'path' for dot-notation traversal.

input.description: A return variable from a previous step's 'returns:' block. Always resolves to ${{ vars.step_name.field }} at runtime.

path.description: Dot-notation path into the return variable's value.

value.description: Expected value. Optional when operator is 'not_null'. Supports ${{ vars.x }} and ${{ env.x }} interpolation.

oneOf.description: validate/object — deep-compare a return variable against a full JSON object.

input.description: A return variable from a previous step's 'returns:' block. Always resolves to ${{ vars.step_name.field }} at runtime.

value.description: Expected JSON object for deep comparison. Supports ${{ vars.x }} and ${{ env.x }} interpolation in values.

oneOf.description: validate/schema — validate a return variable's value against a JSON schema.

input.description: A return variable from a previous step's 'returns:' block. Always resolves to ${{ vars.step_name.field }} at runtime.

schema.description: Schema reference. Use ${{ env.schemas.x }} to reference schemas defined in the TCK manifest.
